title: All In on AI: Michigan Tech Launches New Degree, Concentration and Minor
summary_en: Michigan Technological University will launch a new Bachelor of Science in Artificial Intelligence degree program this fall, making it one of a select group of institutions nationwide to offer a dedicated undergraduate program in the field.  Michigan Tech's new bachelor's  . . .
title_cn: 密歇根理工大学推出人工智能全新本科专业、专业方向及辅修项目

title: Isle Royale Wolf Population Nears Historic High as Moose Numbers Plummet
summary_en: Near-record highs for the number of wolves and near-record lows for the number of moose characterized the 2026 Isle Royale Winter Study, a population survey led by Michigan Tech researchers on Isle Royale National Park.  Michigan Technological University's long-running survey  . . .
title_cn: 2026年罗亚尔岛冬季研究结果发布 狼种群数量接近历史高位驼鹿数量大幅下降
summary_cn: 2026年罗亚尔岛冬季种群调查由密歇根理工大学研究人员牵头在罗亚尔岛国家公园开展，调查实施时间为2026年1月22日至3月3日，调查期间当地气候严寒，曾一度形成连接该偏远群岛与大陆的冰桥。本次调查核心监测对象为岛内狼与驼鹿种群规模，初步结果显示狼种群数量接近历史高位、驼鹿种群数量接近历史低位，相关完整内容已纳入《2025-2026年度罗亚尔岛狼生态研究报告》并在项目官方网站公开。
